title: Manufacturing Engineer - CEAT Tyres - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - CEAT Tyres - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
